    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • getAbstractMachine

      public ISCMachineRoot getAbstractMachine()
      Description copied from interface: IAbstractMachineInfo
      Returns a handle to the abstract machine if there is one, and null otherwise.

      If this method does not return null, then getRefinesClause() does not return null either.

      Specified by:
      getAbstractMachine in interface IAbstractMachineInfo
      Returns:
      a handle to the abstract machine if there is one, and null otherwise

    • getStateType

      public IStateType<?> getStateType()
      Description copied from interface: IState
      Returns the type of this state.
      Specified by:
      getStateType in interface IState
      Returns:
      the state type

    • getRefinesClause

      public IRefinesMachine getRefinesClause()
      Description copied from interface: IAbstractMachineInfo
      Returns a handle to the refines clause from which the abstract machine was extracted, or null if none.

      If this method returns null, then getAbstractMachine() returns null too.

      Specified by:
      getRefinesClause in interface IAbstractMachineInfo
      Returns:
      a handle to the refines clause from which the abstract machine was extracted, or null if none
